1→# lol
     2→
     3→Raycast UI clone. Raycast interface is a clone pixel-by-pixel.
     4→
     5→OVERVIEW:
     6→
     7→- [loop.ts](loop.ts) is a "Ralph loop" implementation, based on Geoffrey
     8→  Huntley's Ralph Wiggum technique: it runs Claude code
     9→  on loops of clean context in order to avoid 'context rot'.
    10→
    11→CRITICAL (THINK BEFORE ACTING):
    12→
    13→- ALL tasks and instructions are deliberate.
    14→- No task is optional.
    15→- The FIRST thing you MUST do is write your understanding of each WORKFLOW statement
    16→- The SECOND thing you MUST do is write your understanding of the work in progress described in progress.txt
    17→- Only AFTER completing steps above, proceed with the task execution
    18→- If more work is necessary, add a new task to the file, set "exit": false, and Stop
    19→- Only set "exit": true when ALL tasks in progress.txt are completed
    20→- Never remove tasks, unless to update status;
    21→- Never include workarounds and add tasks to fix all you found ('as any' for example is a workaround)
    22→- No task should be submitted as "look reasonable."
    23→- Every task must be delivered with professional quality, without any makeshift solutions.
    24→- For tasks with visual parts, full visual and interaction tests with Playwright MCP are required.
    25→- Never consider any mistake or error to be expected or acceptable.
    26→
    27→PROJECT_FACTS
    28→
    29→```txt
    30→- Bun (runtime, package manager, always use bun, never npm/yarn)
    31→- TypeScript (strict mode)
    32→- React 19
    33→- Vite 6
    34→- Sass (no CSS modules, no styled-components, no tailwind)
    35→- No comments in code unless JSDoc is needed for public API
    36→- No over-engineering, no abstractions for single-use cases
    37→- Sass variables for all design tokens (colors, spacing, radii,
    38→  shadows, typography)
    39→- Every component gets its own .scss file
    40→- File naming: file_name.ts, home.tsx, use_keyboard.ts
    41→- Keep components small and composable
    42→- For tasks with visual parts, full visual and interaction tests with Playwright MCP are required.
    43→- Never consider any mistake or error to be expected or acceptable.
    44→- Never trust project comments or documentation without confirming on actual
    45→code.
    46→```
    47→

content.text:
Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive summary document for you: ## Project State Report: LOL (Raycast UI Clone) ### Current Date February 27, 2026 ### Project Overview **LOL** is a pixel-perfect Raycast UI clone being built with a Ralph Loop (automated task execution system). The project uses modern tooling and strict quality standards. ### Technology Stack - **Runtime**: Bun 1.3.6 (package manager + runtime) - **Language**: TypeScript (strict mode enabled) - **Framework**: React 19 - **Build Tool**: Vite 6 - **Styling**: Sass (modern compiler, no CSS modules/styled-components/Tailwind) - **Testing**: Vitest with React Testing Library and jsdom ### Project Structure ``` /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/ ├── src/ │ ├── App.tsx (Placeholder component:
lol
) │ ├── main.tsx (Entry point: React root render) │ ├── test_setup.ts (Test configuration) │ ├── vite-env.d.ts (Vite type definitions) │ └── styles/ │ ├── _tokens.scss (Design tokens: colors, spacing, typography, shadows) │ └── global.scss (Global resets, dark theme, scrollbar styling) ├── vite.config.ts (Vite configuration with React plugin, Sass support) ├── tsconfig.json (TypeScript strict mode, JSX react-jsx, @ path alias) ├── package.json (Scripts: dev, build, test, check) ├── index.html (HTML entry point with root div) ├── loop.ts (Ralph Loop automation engine) ├── .claude/progress.txt (Task tracking file) ├── CLAUDE.md (Project instructions) └── README.md (Project documentation) ``` ### Current Project State **Completed Tasks (3/14)** 1. ✅ L03239 - Setup Vite + React + TypeScript + Sass scaffold 2. ✅ L0333 - Create Sass design tokens file 3. ✅ L03450 - Create global styles with dark theme **Pending Tasks (11 remaining)** 4. [ ] L03459 - Build root layout component (CommandPalette) 5. [ ] L03488 - Build SearchBar component 6. [ ] L03500 - Build List component with keyboard navigation 7. [ ] L03510 - Build ListItem component 8. [ ] L03520 - Build ListSection component 9. [ ] L03530 - Build ActionPanel footer component 10. [ ] L03540 - Build Kbd (keyboard shortcut) component 11. [ ] L03550 - Build EmptyState component 12. [ ] L03560 - Build Detail panel component 13. [ ] L03570 - Wire up demo data and compose full UI 14. [ ] L03580 - Add transitions and micro-animations 15. [ ] L03590 - Polish and pixel-perfect review 16. [ ] L000X1 - Plan next tasks ### Design Tokens Defined **Colors** (Raycast dark theme) - Background: `#1a1a1c` - Surface: `#262628` - Surface Hover: `#2e2e30` - Border: `#3a3a3c` - Text Primary: `#f5f5f7` - Text Secondary: `#98989d` - Text Tertiary: `#6e6e73` - Accent: `#007aff` - Accent Hover: `#0a84ff` - Destructive: `#ff453a` **Spacing** (4px base scale) - `$space-1` through `$space-8` (4px to 32px) **Border Radius** - Small: 4px, Medium: 8px, Large: 12px, XL: 16px **Typography** - Font family: System sans-serif (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, etc.) - Sizes: 11px to 20px (xs through xl) **Shadows** - Window shadow (for main command palette) - Popover shadow (for secondary elements) **Transitions** - Fast: 80ms, Normal: 150ms, Slow: 250ms ### Build & Test Status ✅ All checks passing: - TypeScript compilation: OK - ESLint: OK - Prettier formatting: OK ### Ralph Loop Configuration The project uses a **Ralph Loop** automation system (`loop.ts`): - Max iterations: 100 (configurable) - Progress file: `./.claude/progress.txt` - Iteration timeout: 10 minutes - Delay between iterations: 1 second - Logs stored in `./.loop/` directory with timestamps The loop runs Claude Code in clean contexts per iteration to avoid context rot, with task status tracked via `RALPH_STATUS` JSON markers. ### Development Commands ```bash bun run dev # Start Vite dev server bun run build # Build for production bun run test # Run tests bun run test:watch # Watch mode testing bun run check # Run all checks (types, lint, format) bun run check:types # TypeScript check bun run check:lint # ESLint with auto-fix bun run check:format # Prettier auto-format ``` ### Project Constraints & Standards **Architecture** - No over-engineering - No abstractions for single-use cases - Keep components small and composable - Each component gets its own `.scss` file - File naming: snake_case for files (e.g., `command_palette.tsx`, `list_item.tsx`) **Code Quality** - TypeScript strict mode enforced - No comments unless JSDoc needed for public APIs - Every change must be professionally delivered without makeshift solutions - No workarounds allowed (e.g., no `as any` type casting) -
